clips.title: The Forge
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A dim blacksmith's forge, glowing coals, an anvil, showering sparks. Night, ember-lit. A person in a scarred leather apron hammers a glowing blade, sweat and soot on the arms. Tongs, a quench bucket, hanging tools. Hot orange forge glow, high dynamic range. 50mm, slow dolly in. Extreme texture detail, crisp sparks, tack-sharp, 24fps.

clips.title: Fine Movement
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A watchmaker's bench, tiny brass gears, tweezers, an open movement. Daytime, focused lamp. A person with a loupe to one eye leans over a watch, tweezers poised, steady hands. Screwdrivers, a parts tray, a magnifier. Bright focused task light, high dynamic range. 85mm macro, slow dolly in. Every gear tooth sharp, extreme detail, 24fps.

clips.title: The Sear
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A professional kitchen pass, a cast-iron pan, a steak searing, flames licking up. Evening, hot. A person in a chef's jacket bastes the steak with a spoon, focused. Rosemary sprig, butter, tongs. Warm flame light with hard key, high dynamic range. 100mm macro, slow dolly in. Crisp crust texture, frozen droplets, tack-sharp, 24fps.

clips.title: The Grip
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A sunlit granite rock face, chalk dust, tiny holds, valley far below. Midday, bright. A person in a climbing harness grips a crimp, chalked fingers straining, muscles taut. A chalk bag, a carabiner, taped fingers. Hard midday sun, high dynamic range. 35mm, side tracking. Skin and rock texture in extreme detail, tack-sharp, 24fps.

clips.title: Loaded Brush
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. An artist's studio close on a canvas, thick oil paint, a loaded brush mid-stroke. Daytime, soft light. A person's hand in a paint-flecked sleeve draws the brush across the canvas, wet paint peaking. A palette, tubes, a rag. Soft north light, high dynamic range. 100mm macro, slow dolly in. Every bristle and paint ridge sharp, extreme detail, 24fps.

clips.title: Break Surface
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A sunlit ocean surface, spray and foam, a wave curling behind. Midday, bright. A person in a wetsuit rises out of the water, sheeting droplets, hair slicked back. A surfboard leash, foam, sunlit spray. Hard sun through spray, high dynamic range. 50mm, slow dolly in. Frozen water droplets, crisp texture, tack-sharp, 24fps.

clips.title: On the Wheel
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A pottery studio close on a spinning wheel, wet grey clay rising between hands. Daytime, soft light. A person's clay-slick hands shape the spinning vessel, fingers pressing the wall. A water bowl, a wire tool, splatter. Soft window light, high dynamic range. 85mm macro, slow dolly in. Wet clay sheen and fingerprints sharp, extreme detail, 24fps.

clips.title: Into the Smoke
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A burning structure interior, drifting embers, smoke, orange glow. Night, intense. A person in full firefighter turnout gear and helmet advances with a hose, visor reflecting flame. An axe, a tank, floating embers. Hard fire glow through smoke, high dynamic range. 35mm, handheld push. Crisp embers and gear texture, tack-sharp, 24fps.

clips.title: The Setting
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A jeweler's bench under bright light, a gold ring in a clamp, a faceted gemstone. Daytime, focused. A person with fine tools sets the stone into the setting, tweezers steady. A loupe, tiny prongs, a polishing cloth. Bright focused light, high dynamic range. 100mm macro, slow dolly in. Gem facets and metal grain razor-sharp, extreme detail, 24fps.

clips.title: The Breakaway
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A sunlit road cycling race, a peloton blurred behind, heat shimmer. Midday, bright. A person in a race kit and helmet powers the pedals mid-effort, sweat flying, jaw set. A race number, sunglasses, a bike frame. Hard sun, high dynamic range. 200mm, side tracking. Sweat droplets and fabric weave sharp, tack-sharp, 24fps.

clips.title: First Sprout
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A garden bed close on rich dark soil, a tiny green sprout, dew beads. Morning, soft light. A person's weathered hands cup the soil around the sprout, dirt under the nails. A trowel, seed packet, worms. Soft morning light, high dynamic range. 100mm macro, slow dolly in. Soil grain and dew droplets sharp, extreme detail, 24fps.

clips.title: Downpour
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, present day. A city street in heavy rain at night, streetlights haloed, puddles rippling. Night, downpour. A person in a soaked rain jacket stands still, water running off the fabric, droplets on the hood. Rain rings in puddles, wet pavement sheen, a distant sign. Cool street light through rain, high dynamic range. 50mm, slow dolly in. Every droplet on the coat sharp, tack-sharp, 24fps.
